DatasetTitle: GENERAL HEALTH BY TYPE OF COMMUNAL ESTABLISHMENT  BY AGE BY SEX
StatisticalPopulations: All usual residents in communal establishments (excluding staff and their families)
Annotations: 1. General health refers to health over the 12 months prior to Census day (27 March 2011).; 2. 'HSCT (Health and Social Care Trust)' was referred to as NHS/HSSB in the 2001 Census.; 3. 'Residents' excludes staff or owners and family members of staff or owners.; 4. 'Age' is age at last birthday.
